artifact: GLM-5.2 co-activation atlas overlay (unconditional + per-pair topic support)
source_trace: glm52-routing-trace-export/v2 (pierre427, mlx-lm fork release glm52-routing-atlas-20260722; MLX enable_offload pager, greedy decode, 10 labeled prompts)

definitions.heat: decode tokens where expert e in the layer's top-k
definitions.pairs: [i, j, count, lift, category_support]; count/lift as in the Qwen profiles (count>=5, lift>=1.5, top 2000/layer); category_support = number of the 10 topic categories where the pair co-fires >=2 times (the #175 canonical-vs-conditional axis: high support = canonical candidate)
definitions.clusters: greedy-modularity communities of the decode co-activation graph, heat-ordered
definitions.chain_order: within-cluster greedy max-co-weight path (directional at this volume; no layout action implied — see thread)

caveats: volume: 1270 decode rows across 10 prompts (~vs 75,773 in the Qwen 30B profile) — treat lift as directional; at this N the count>=5 threshold itself implies lift ~>=4 for a random-rate pair, so surviving pairs are strong ones
scores in the source trace are SELECTION scores (sigmoid+bias, bias-dominated) — margin analyses should use rank gaps of that quantity, not treat it as gating weight (see source score_note)
MTP slot (moe_order 75, gid 19200..19455) reserved-not-traced: not exercised by greedy decode

reserved_not_traced.role: MTP next-token head (num_nextn_predict_layers=1 in the zai-org source; a full 256-expert DSA layer). Occupies the 76th MoE slot of the 19,456 gid space but is not exercised by plain greedy decode, so it carries no trace rows.
